item.title: Trump Predicts 100K Dow by End of Presidency
item.description: President Donald Trump hailed his first year of his second term in office, predicting the stock market will double in less than two years after the Do...

item.title: Taiwan: 40% Shift of Chip Capacity to US 'Impossible'
item.description: It would be "impossible" to move 40% of Taiwan's semiconductor capacity to the U.S., the island's top tariff negotiator said, pushing back against rec...

item.title: Live Nation Execs in Talks With DOJ to Avert Trial
item.description: Live Nation executives and lobbyists are in talks with senior officials at the U.S. Department of Justice in a bid to avoid a trial over allegations t...

item.title: Trump: Bad Bunny's Super Bowl Halftime Show Was 'Absolutely Terrible'
item.description: President Donald Trump said on Sunday in a social media post that the Super Bowl halftime show fronted by singer Bad Bunny was "absolutely terrible."

item.title: N.Y. Gov. Candidate Blakeman Picks Sheriff for Running Mate
item.description: Republican gubernatorial candidate Bruce Blakeman is expected to announce Fulton County Sheriff Richard Giardino as his running mate in New York's 202...
